title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an extensible resource type hierarchy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.
Use zero-argument super for cooperative method chains and pass compatible arguments through participating classes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
